name: canxiangcc--aminer-open-academic
description: Use the AMiner Open Platform API for academic data queries and analysis. Use this skill when users need to look up scholar profiles, paper details, institution data, journal content, or patent information. Trigger scenarios: mentions of AMiner, academic data queries, searching for papers/scholars/institutions/journals/patents, academic Q&A search, citation analysis, research institution analysis, scholar portraits, paper citation chains, journal submission analysis, etc. Supports 6 combined workflows (Scholar Profile, Paper Deep Dive, Org Analysis, Venue Papers, Paper QA Search, Patent Analysis) and direct calls to all 28 individual APIs. Even if the user simply says "look up scholar XXX" or "find papers about XXX", proactively use this skill.
